fleet.imageAlt: Equipped ambulance fleet in Casablanca - Ambulance Morocco
fleet.feature1Text: All our ambulances undergo regular safety inspections and are equipped according to international medical standards
fleet.feature2Text: Defibrillators, cardiac monitors, medical oxygen, and comfortable stretchers in every vehicle
fleet.feature3Text: Our ambulances are positioned at strategic points in Casablanca to ensure arrival within 15 minutes

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I call an ambulance?
faq.a1: Call our number or send a WhatsApp message. We arrive in less than 15 minutes within the city.
faq.q2: Is the service available at night?
faq.a2: Yes, our ambulance service is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including holidays.
faq.q3: How much does patient transport cost?
faq.a3: The price varies depending on distance and type of service. Call us for a free estimate.
faq.a4: Yes, all our ambulances are equipped with the latest medical and resuscitation equipment.
faq.a5: We cover all major Moroccan cities and their surrounding areas, including Casablanca, Maarif, Anfa, Sidi Maarouf, and Mohammedia.
faq.a6: Yes, we work with most health insurance companies. Contact us to verify your coverage.

review1.name: Mohamed B.
review1.text: Excellent service! They arrived quickly and were very professional. Thank you!

review2.name: Fatima Z.
review2.text: They transported my father to the hospital safely. Thank you so much.

review3.name: Ahmed M.
review3.text: Excellent and professional service. Always on time. Thank you so much!

review4.name: Said H.
review4.text: I called them at 3 AM to transport my mother from Maarif to the university hospital. They arrived in just 12 minutes. Very professional team and the ambulance was clean and well-equipped.

review5.name: Khadija R.
review5.text: The best ambulance service in Casablanca. We used them 3 times to transport my grandfather for dialysis. Always on time and professional.

review6.name: Youssef A.
review6.text: The driver and nurse were amazing. They treated my sick father with respect and great care. Clean vehicle and modern equipment. Highly recommended.

city.heroSubtitle: Emergency medical and patient transport in {city} and surrounding areas. Available 24/7.

transport-vsl.title: Medical Transport VSL in Casablanca
transport-vsl.subtitle: Light Medical Transport (VSL) service available 24/7. Comfortable and safe transport for medical appointments and examinations.
transport-vsl.detailTitle: Medical Transport VSL – Comfortable Patient Transport
transport-vsl.detailText: We provide Light Medical Transport (VSL) for patients who don't require intensive medical care during the journey. Ideal for medical appointments, regular check-ups, and treatment sessions. Our vehicles are comfortable, clean, and fully equipped.
features: Full coverage of Casablanca and surroundings
transport-vsl.coverageText: VSL Medical Transport is available in all Casablanca neighborhoods: Maarif, Anfa, Sidi Maarouf, Ain Chock, Hay Hassani, extending to Bouskoura and Mohammedia. Response time under 15 minutes.
transport-vsl.ctaText: Call us now for immediate or scheduled booking. Our team is ready 24/7.

urgence-reanimation.title: Emergency & Resuscitation in Casablanca
urgence-reanimation.subtitle: Emergency medical service with specialized resuscitation team. Fast response within 15 minutes in Casablanca.
urgence-reanimation.detailText: Our emergency and resuscitation service is dedicated to critical cases requiring immediate medical intervention. Ambulances equipped with advanced resuscitation equipment and qualified medical team including doctor and specialized nurse.
urgence-reanimation.coverageText: Our teams are positioned at strategic points in Casablanca: near the Corniche and Ain Diab, Maarif and Anfa, Sidi Maarouf and Hay Hassani. We also cover Bouskoura and Mohammedia.
urgence-reanimation.ctaText: Don't wait. Our emergency and resuscitation team is ready to respond in under 15 minutes.

transport-dialyse.title: Dialysis Transport in Casablanca
transport-dialyse.subtitle: Regular and comfortable transport service for dialysis patients. Weekly scheduling with fixed appointments.
transport-dialyse.detailTitle: Dialysis Transport – Regular and Reliable Service
transport-dialyse.detailText: We understand that dialysis patients need regular and reliable transport. We offer a dedicated transport service with fixed, regular schedules and drivers who know the routes and dialysis centers in Casablanca.
features: Regular transport schedule with fixed times
transport-dialyse.coverageText: We transport patients to and from all dialysis centers in Casablanca and Mohammedia. Coverage includes Ibn Rochd University Hospital and dialysis centers in Maarif, Anfa, Sidi Maarouf, and Ain Chock.
transport-dialyse.ctaText: Call us to arrange a comfortable weekly transport schedule at competitive rates.

rapatriement-sanitaire.title: Medical Repatriation from Casablanca
rapatriement-sanitaire.subtitle: National and international medical repatriation service. Safe patient transport between cities and countries.
rapatriement-sanitaire.detailText: Our medical repatriation service is dedicated to transporting patients over long distances, whether between Moroccan cities or internationally. Ambulances equipped for long journeys with accompanying medical team.
features: Medical team accompanying throughout the journey
rapatriement-sanitaire.coverageText: Departures from Casablanca to all Moroccan cities: Rabat, Marrakech, Fes, Tangier, Agadir, Oujda. International medical repatriation available on request.
rapatriement-sanitaire.ctaText: Call us to organize safe and comfortable medical repatriation. We handle all the details for you.

transport-pmr.title: Reduced Mobility Transport in Casablanca
transport-pmr.subtitle: Adapted vehicles for transporting people with reduced mobility. Ramps and special equipment for total comfort.
transport-pmr.detailTitle: Reduced Mobility Transport – Complete Adapted Equipment
transport-pmr.detailText: We offer a dedicated transport service for people with reduced mobility. Our vehicles are equipped with wheelchair ramps, lowered floors, and secure fastening systems. Our team is trained to assist all types of disability with respect and care.
features: Transport for medical appointments and activities
transport-pmr.coverageText: Reduced mobility transport is available in all Casablanca neighborhoods. We serve Maarif, Anfa, Sidi Maarouf, Ain Chock, Hay Hassani, Bouskoura, and Mohammedia.
transport-pmr.ctaText: Call us to book an adapted vehicle for people with reduced mobility. Comfort and safety guaranteed.

quartierPages.localText: We provide fast and reliable ambulance service in {quartier}, Casablanca. Our teams know the area well and arrive quickly. {landmark}. Whether you need regular medical transport or emergency ambulance, we're here 24/7.
